description: Insufficient hash verification refers to the failure to properly verify hashes, such as message hashes or transaction hashes. This can lead to: - Unauthorized actions by malicious actors. - Loss of funds or data. - Exploitation of the contract's logic.
name: Insufficient Hash Verification
remediation: - **Validate hashes:** Ensure all hashes are properly verified before processing. - **Use secure libraries:** Leverage well-audited libraries for hash verification. - **Test thoroughly:** Conduct extensive testing to ensure hash verification works as intended.
